title: Twitch Clip
description: Represents a clip created from a Twitch live stream or VOD, including metadata about the broadcaster, creator, and source video.

url.description: URL to view the clip on Twitch

broadcaster_id.description: ID of the broadcaster whose channel the clip was created on

creator_id.description: ID of the user who created the clip

creator_name.description: Display name of the clip creator

video_id.description: ID of the video the clip was created from

game_id.description: ID of the game/category during clip creation

language.description: Language of the stream when the clip was created

view_count.description: Number of times the clip has been viewed

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the clip was created

thumbnail_url.description: URL of the clip's thumbnail image

duration.description: Duration of the clip in seconds

vod_offset.description: Offset in the VOD where the clip starts (null if VOD is unavailable)
